name: Chicken with Apples
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Apple cider or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a casserole, heat butter and oil and brown chicken; season with salt and pepper if desired.
2. Warm brandy in saucepan, ignite, and pour over chicken. Allow flame to burn itself out.
3. Add apples and onion.
4. Combine cider, sour cream, flour, and herbs; stir until smooth and pour over contents of casserole.
5. Bake, covered, at 350 degrees for 1 hour, or until chicken is tender. If you want, 2 cups of cider or apple juice may be used; just omit the sour cream and use 2 tablespoons of flour. You can also try it without the tarragon, using 1/4 teaspoon each of nutmeg, cinnamon, and ground cloves.
6. Serve with: French bread, watercress, or spinach salad.
